headline: Jefferies says this beaten-down transport stock could surge 18%
summary: Investing.com -- Investment bank Jefferies has upgraded C.H. Robinson Worldwide to a “Buy” rating, arguing that the freight broker’s technology transformation, regulatory advantages, and consolidation potential position it for significant long-term earnings growth.

headline: This CH Robinson Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Wednesday
summary: Top Wall Street analysts upgraded SM Energy, Rubrik Inc, CH Robinson Worldwide Inc, Elevance Health Inc, and Centene Corp. Analysts also have a positive outlook on CHRW stock.

headline: Jefferies Upgrades C.H. Robinson Worldwide to Buy, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: Jefferies  analyst Stephanie Moore   upgrades C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) from Hold to Buy and raises the price target from $195 to $200.
